title: Basic Kitchen Skills
description: Learn essential kitchen skills that every beginner should master, including knife handling, measuring ingredients, and basic cooking techniques.

steps.instruction: Familiarize yourself with the kitchen tools you'll be using, such as knives, cutting boards, and measuring cups.
Practice proper knife handling techniques, including how to hold a knife and basic cutting methods.
Learn how to measure ingredients accurately for recipes.
Understand the importance of kitchen safety, including how to handle hot surfaces and sharp objects.

milestones: Accurately measure ingredients for a simple recipe.
